abort.no_apple_tv_entries: No Apple TV integrations found. Please set up the Apple TV integration first.

user.title: HomePod TTS Setup
user.description: Configure a HomePod for TTS announcements via Gemini.

data.name: Friendly name
data.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key (leave empty to use Edge TTS only)

init.title: HomePod TTS Options
init.description: Choose the text-to-speech engine. The next step shows settings specific to your choice.

data.tts_prompt: Default style prompt (e.g. 'Say this calmly') — Gemini only
data.chime_path: Custom chime file path (used when chime sound is 'Custom file path')
data.chime_volume: Chime volume in audio mix (1.0 = unchanged)
data.chime_offset: Chime-TTS offset in ms (negative trims chime tail)
data.mini_volume_scale: HomePod mini volume scale (1.0 = same as full-size; assign label 'homepod_mini' to mini entities)
data.mute_entity: Mute entity (when on, all notifications are silenced)
data.quiet_entity: Quiet mode entity (when on, whisper mode is active)
data.cache_enabled: Cache TTS audio (avoid re-generating same content)
